case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. CHELSEA L. WILSKE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,510.50 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WILSKE, CHELSEA L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-12-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT WILSKE, CHELSEA L.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.50 - SERVED JUN-12-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILSKE, CHELSEA L.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER FOR THE CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S OFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHELSEA L. WILSKE. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSKE, CHELSEA L. $3,510.50 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,555.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
